title: Add sliding-window eval to MLX trainer
author: FlorinelTudor
body:
## Summary
- add sliding-window evaluation support to the MLX trainer behind EVAL_STRIDE and EVAL_BATCH_SEQS
- add GPT.forward_logits so MLX eval can score per-token NLL over overlapping windows
- add focused tests for sliding window coverage and scoring behavior

## Why
The public record shows that evaluation strategy alone can materially improve val_bpb by scoring each token with richer context. This brings the same idea to train_gpt_mlx.py for local Apple Silicon experimentation.

## Testing
- .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_train_gpt_mlx_quantization tests.test_train_gpt_mlx_model_config tests.test_train_gpt_mlx_sliding_eval
- tiny end-to-end MLX smoke run with EVAL_STRIDE=64 completed successfully
